column1: # Sweep — Scalar vs Matrix LR arbiter (2026-04-22)
# PURPOSE: end the scalar-vs-matrix argument with clean N=3 means at the SAME
# budget, seeds, and script. One month of sweeps has two unresolved candidates:
#   Arm A: MATRIX_LR=0.042           (our locked ship config; 3k N=3 mean = 1.4259)
#   Arm B: SCALAR_LR=0.030 (matrix default 0.026 = script fallback; never N=3'd)
#   Arm C: MATRIX_LR=0.022           (bigbag's published SOTA value; never A/B'd)
# At 2000 iters, seeds {42, 314, 1337} — identical to s32 so we can reuse that as
# extra statistical power for Arm A if needed.
#   else                                             → seeds noise; pick lowest MATRIX_LR for H100 (0.022)
# NOTE: each row uses identical QK/WARMDOWN/TTT/EMA/SOFTCAP to isolate the LR lever.

column2: QK_GAIN_INIT=5.5 WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.64 TTT_ENABLED=1 SLIDING_WINDOW_ENABLED=1 TTT_EPOCHS=1 EMA_DECAY=0.995 LOGIT_SOFTCAP=20 MATRIX_LR=0.042 ITERATIONS=2000 MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=3600 TIMEOUT_SECS=5400 FAST_SMOKE=0 SEED=42 NOTES=arm_A_matrix_042

QK_GAIN_INIT=5.5 WARMDOWN_FRAC=0.64 TTT_ENABLED=1 SLIDING_WINDOW_ENABLED=1 TTT_EPOCHS=1 EMA_DECAY=0.995 LOGIT_SOFTCAP=20 MATRIX_LR=0.042 ITERATIONS=2000 MAX_WALLCLOCK_SECONDS=3600 TIMEOUT_SECS=5400 FAST_SMOKE=0 SEED=314 NOTES=arm_A_matrix_042
